title: FilterCondition — worksheet wire filter condition (shared type)
description: One row-filter condition as the HAP server stores it. Carried as a FLAT ARRAY of these objects; AND/OR grouping lives on each item's spliceType (1=AND, 2=OR). Consumers: view filters (`hap worksheet view update --view-json` filters attr), quick filters' underlying conditions, business rules (`worksheet save-rule --filters`), custom-action enableWhen / button config filters (`worksheet save-button`), chart filter.items (`worksheet chart create/update --spec-json`), and custom-page filter components (filtersGroup.filters in `custom-page save`). Each consumer wraps this array in its own envelope (views inline it; charts and page filter components mint a stored filterId/filtersGroupId from it) — see the module reference docs for the envelopes.

dataType.description: The control's type integer (same enum as the field dictionary, e.g. 2=text, 6=number, 9/11=single-select, 15/16=date, 26=member, 29=relation). Required by the server to interpret values.

spliceType.description: Group logic of this condition relative to its siblings: 1=AND, 2=OR.

filterType.description: Operator enum: 1=contains, 2=equals (also 'is any of' with multiple values), 3=starts with, 4=ends with, 5=not contains, 6=not equals (also 'is none of'), 7=is empty, 8=is not empty, 9=not starts with, 10=not ends with, 11=between, 12=not between, 13=>, 14=>=, 15=<, 16=<=, 17=date is, 18=date is not, 21=self, 22=self and subordinates, 23=subordinates, 24=relation equals, 25=relation not equals, 28=contains all, 51=option equals, 52=option not equals. For single-select controls (dataType 9/11) the UI writes 51/52; the server also accepts 2/6 with a values array ('is any of' / 'is none of') — both encodings are valid, prefer copying whatever an existing object you read back uses. Operators 7/8/21/22/23 carry no values.

values.description: Comparison values. Option fields: option keys. Member/relation fields: ids. Multi-value with filterType 2/51 means 'is any of'.

value.description: Convenience single-value string (kept alongside values for single-value conditions).

dataRange.description: Date relativity bucket for date operators (0 when not a relative-date condition).

dateRange.description: Relative-date enum used with date operators (e.g. today/yesterday/this week/this month buckets).

dateRangeType.description: Granularity selector that accompanies dateRange (day/week/month style).

isDynamicsource.description: True when the comparison value is dynamic (taken from another field or the page context) instead of a literal.

dynamicSource.description: Dynamic value references, used with isDynamicsource=true.

cid.description: Source control id ('rowid'/'current-rowid' for the record itself).

rcid.description: Context the source control belongs to ('url', 'fastFilter', 'navGroup', or a relation control id).
